requests.name: tts_cold
requests.text: This is the first OuteTTS request in a long-lived session.

requests.name: tts_repeat
requests.text: This is the first OuteTTS request in a long-lived session.

requests.name: tts_longform
requests.text: Long-form synthesis is split by the shared framework text chunker. Each sentence becomes a bounded request while model weights and the cached generation graph stay inside the same long-lived session. The generated audio chunks are appended in order to form one output waveform.

requests.name: clone_cold
requests.text: This request builds and caches the reference voice profile.
requests.reference_text: Some call me nature. Others call me Mother Nature. I've been here for over 4.5 billion years. 22,500 times longer than you.

requests.name: clone_repeat
requests.text: This request builds and caches the reference voice profile.
requests.reference_text: Some call me nature. Others call me Mother Nature. I've been here for over 4.5 billion years. 22,500 times longer than you.
